summary: A small rectangular fortification or watchtower with a stone brick base, dark wood plank roof with stepped pyramid gable design, and multiple small barred windows. The structure sits on a raised dirt foundation with gravel trim, featuring symmetrical architecture and defensive aesthetics.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

elements: barred windows (4 visible on front, likely on all sides)
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stone brick base approximately 10x10 blocks
Raise foundation with dirt block platform, surround with gravel trim
Create 4 evenly-spaced barred window openings on each wall (approximately 2 blocks wide, 2 blocks tall)
Construct stepped pyramid roof using dark wood planks with 3-4 ascending layers
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all sides
Roof peak should be centered and rise approximately 4-5 blocks above wall top
Use dark wood (dark oak or similar) for roof to match color in images
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise window bar material (likely iron bars but not definitively confirmed)
Whether structure has multiple floors or is single-story interior
Exact block count for foundation depth
Specific wood type (dark oak vs. dark wood variant)
